userStories.title: Codex adapter implementation
userStories.description: Implement AgentAdapter interface for Codex. Handle 'codex -q --prompt' for one-shot calls and 'codex' interactive for sessions. Parse exit codes and output.
acceptanceCriteria: CodexAdapter implements execute(), complete(), and isInstalled()
complete() uses 'codex -q --prompt <text>'
execute() uses 'codex' in interactive mode
Binary detection via Bun.which('codex')
Unit tests cover binary detection, success/error exit codes, and output parsing

userStories.title: OpenCode adapter implementation
userStories.description: Implement AgentAdapter interface for OpenCode. Handle 'opencode --prompt' for one-shot mode. Detect binary via Bun.which('opencode').
acceptanceCriteria: OpenCodeAdapter implements complete() using 'opencode --prompt <text>'
isInstalled() returns true if 'opencode' binary exists
Unit tests mock Bun.spawn and verify command construction
Integrated into AgentRegistry

userStories.title: Gemini CLI adapter implementation
userStories.description: Implement AgentAdapter interface for Gemini CLI. Handle 'gemini -p' for one-shot mode. Support Google auth flow detection in precheck.
acceptanceCriteria: GeminiAdapter implements complete() using 'gemini -p <text>'
isInstalled() returns true if 'gemini' binary exists
Authentication check (Google auth) included in isInstalled() or precheck
Unit tests verify correct command line flags

userStories.title: Aider adapter implementation
userStories.description: Implement AgentAdapter interface for Aider. Handle 'aider --message --yes' for headless mode. Support --model flag passthrough from nax config.
acceptanceCriteria: AiderAdapter implements complete() using 'aider --message <text> --yes'
--model flag passed correctly when specified in options
isInstalled() returns true if 'aider' binary exists
Unit tests verify headless mode flags (--yes)

userStories.title: Codex context generator
userStories.description: Add Codex context generator to output codex.md or AGENTS.md from nax/context.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Codex context generator implemented
Supports AGENTS.md and codex.md naming conventions
Correctly maps nax context fields to target format

userStories.title: Gemini CLI context generator
userStories.description: Add Gemini CLI context generator to output GEMINI.md from nax/context.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Gemini CLI context generator implemented
Generates GEMINI.md in the project root
Follows Gemini CLI context expectations
priorErrors: Attempt 1 failed with model tier: fast: Tests failed (exit code TEST_FAILURE)

priorFailures.summary: Failed with tier fast, escalating to next tier

userStories.title: Update nax generate to include new generators
userStories.description: Update 'nax generate' command to include the new context generators for multi-agent support. Update AgentType union type.
acceptanceCriteria: 'nax generate' lists new agents as options
AgentType type includes 'codex', 'opencode', 'gemini', 'aider'
Existing generators (Claude, Aider) still work

userStories.title: Unit tests for all multi-agent adapters
userStories.description: Add comprehensive unit tests for all 4 new adapters mocking Bun.spawn and testing all logic paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover success and failure exit codes for each agent
Prompt construction and flag mapping verified
Output parsing (stderr vs stdout) covered
Use _deps injection pattern for testability

userStories.title: Integration test suite for multi-agent support
userStories.description: Create an integration test suite that smoke tests each adapter by calling complete('return hello') when the binary is found.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests skip gracefully when binary is missing
Success path verified for each installed agent
One-shot completion verified in real (mocked or local) environment

userStories.title: Precheck updates for multi-agent support
userStories.description: Update nax precheck to detect and report which agents are available in the system path.
acceptanceCriteria: nax precheck identifies installed agents
Displays version information for each detected binary
Health status reported for each configured agent

userStories.title: Document multi-agent config in nax config --explain
userStories.description: Update 'nax config --explain agents' to document defaultAgent, fallbackOrder, and per-agent model mapping.
acceptanceCriteria: --explain output includes multi-agent configuration details
Clear documentation for fallback logic provided
Model mapping rules explained

userStories.title: Implement nax agents CLI command
userStories.description: Add a new 'nax agents' command to list available agents with their binary paths, versions, and health status.
acceptanceCriteria: 'nax agents' displays a table of agents
Shows version, path, and capabilities for each
Identifies which agent is currently configured as default
